text: Warning: Think twice before using Groww for Active Trading! 🛑 ​​"Don't use Groww for active trading or options. It's okay for long-term investment or just monitoring stocks, but for execution, it is very unreliable. The app lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate. Using it for trading is a sure way to lose your money due to technical errors. Stay safe and choose a better platform for trading."I have personally suffered a loss of over ₹10+ Lakhs..

So far the experience has been good. However, you guys don't update data regularly. eg. Recently I received a mail from ICICI fundhouse that the expense ratio of ICICI Large cap has increased from 0.69% to 0.72% but in your app the rate is 0.87%. This is a huge problem as we normally check these parameters before making any investments. There are many other lapses like this. You should focus on fixing these issues.

Earlier, this app worked fine, but over the last month, it has become very unreliable. Withdrawing money is not as easy as it used to be — most of the time, my withdrawal requests get auto-declined without any clear reason. There’s no response from customer care, and the issue remains unresolved. Very disappointing experience lately. Not recommended until they fix these problems.

I am trying since many days to import all internal and external Mutual Funds but app is just showing that they will come with new update shortly, but i don't know when new updates will come. Till the time we just have to wait. It is a very disappointing thing in today's digital era customer have to wait so long just to get own funds details. Team request to resolve at earliest

very worst app . After settlement final price is changed. In my experience I book loss in future options position appz Rs 1450 in morning before 11 am. at night after settlement they deduct Rs 3829 . entry show 3829 loss for future options in transaction history. There customer support show as 24/7 but I try to connect then no one give response on call. There is no option to give Star ⭐ below 1 otherwise i will give him negative rating.
